Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Akura clan has provided battle reports regarding encounters with Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Akura family has shielded the Empire from dragons for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Akura family is apathetic toward the Blackflame Empire except for being both human.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura clan made a request regarding an errant daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura clan owns three-quarters of the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura clan employs the world's greatest dream artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura clan's dream-readers can see shifts in fate and the currents of destiny.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura clan does not entirely approve of Mercy's presence.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Mercy is a member of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn are under the protection of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan is a group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Akura family is described as an empire of children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Akura family has different branches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Akura clan rewards for each Underlord head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The power of black dragons dwarfed the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin and Mercy are seen as members of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura family is an entity that should not be opposed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Akura family deals with dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon has no grudge against the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Harmony's armor is the bloodline legacy of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura family might compete in the upcoming competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura family hid their child's fate from the Monarch.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Akura clan has legendary pillars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan is famous for their use of shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura family's favor determines if the Blackflame Empire thrives or dies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura family took responsibility for Renfei's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan is described as vaunted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Akura family provided a signal to Emperor Naru Huan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Akura clan considers Night Wheel Valley a treasured territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Akura family makes their vassals compete.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — The Akura family is involved in a competition involving the gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura clan has a mountain-sized fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon wonders what the Akura family will think of his actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura clan is a Monarch faction on the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura family has vassals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura clan is a group that King Dakata serves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji questions if everyone in the Akura family is insane.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The Akura clan is mentioned in relation to Harmony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The Akura clan owns territory where Lindon's family lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon will compete on behalf of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The favored young Underlords of the Akura clan are lined up.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Akura clan is preparing Lindon and Mercy for the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura clan is composed of family members including a Monarch and Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon was not raised with the training of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is considered a guest of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan is a Monarch's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan sent a gift in an ornate black wood chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura family symbol is a moon-pale image of a mountain range topped by three stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Frozen Blade school is a vassal faction under the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon stated he would not oppose the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The Akura clan offers high-quality clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura clan was targeted in the tournament by gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura clan is ushered into the Ninecloud Court by servants in rainbow robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura faction is gathering together in the jungle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura family is viewed by Eithan as oppressors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon intends to gather Akura faction competitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The second round of the competition split the Akura faction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura family is led by the daughter of Monarch Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Many people trying to talk to Lindon were from the Akura family.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura clan has an assigned tower in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura family resides in an amethyst spire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Members of the Akura clan have purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon was previously taken to the Akura family for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy can join the ordinary audience of the Akura faction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon purchased hunger madra in the name of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The inhabitants of the ocean are largely hostile to the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura family has allies among the Heralds and Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura family has raised a Herald, a Sage, and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom arrived at the location to obey an Akura summons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Akura clan is a group mentioned by Yan Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Some displaced sacred artists have sought shelter with the Akura clan factions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Maraan intended to teach the Akura clan a lesson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura clan had taken Lindon to task over Harmony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Akura clan's hope for winning Penance is Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura clan possesses thousands of soulfire arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Akura clan gave Sophara a life-size goldsteel statue of Ekeri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Akura clan contributed advancement resources to Yerin's training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — The Akura name is greater than any one of its members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — The Akura clan is associated with House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Akura clan is capable of operating on its own during a crisis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Akura family will provide resources to Yerin because their prosperity is in her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Every member of the Akura family is named after a virtue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Akura faction is handling their own war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Akura faction was in a state of chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Akura clan settles down and may still honor contribution points.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Akura clan has three pillars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — A representative of the Akura clan has arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Akura clan provides protection to people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura clan is conducting an investigation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura clan has three stars, but is down to two.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon blames the Akura clan for not trying to help the people in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Akura clan would not let the victor of the Uncrowned King tournament go without a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura clan has provided a fleet of cloudships for evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura clan unloaded refugees at the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — There are forty Akura clan Golds behind Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The first waves of the Akura clan have not yet returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Akura clan has a member who shouted to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura clan has Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura clan has a head family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Moongrave is the capital of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen considered the Akura clan but did not know them.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon and Eithan previously had to borrow the name of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon would contact the Akura clan if Mercy's life were in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura clan declared the labyrinth territory off-limits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon was honored in front of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Charity and Malice are pillars of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Heart Sage took Mercy to help lead the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The area where Dross is speaking is Akura clan territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura clan has Herald-level spirits that shine like bonfires.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Akura clan is a clan ruled by Queen Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — A statue of Mercy sits at the head of the Akura clan in the World of Night.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Some Sages and Heralds owe allegiance to the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Justice is part of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Akura clan has enough experts to keep Lindon under control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura clan is a power that can be antagonized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — The Akura clan uses a purple-and-black aesthetic as its banner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura clan mustered twelve Archlords for the defense of Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Akura Malice spoke by the authority of the Akura clan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has not let Mercy out of his sight since leaving the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy felt a memory of her faith in the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider does not share the bias against sacred beasts held by many in the Akura clan.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata was once a guest of the Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The characters are currently in the Akura clan's territory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
